description: Reel has a pinned comment with 'DM us to book' CTA. OCR finds overlay text. Video download succeeds.

expectedEvidencePack.ocrFullText: SUMMER SALE 50% OFF EVERYTHING LIMITED TIME
expectedEvidencePack.transcript: Hey guys, summer collection just dropped and we have 50 percent off everything for the next 48 hours. DM us or click the link in bio to shop now.
expectedEvidencePack.pinnedCommentText: DM us to book your styling session! Link in bio for instant booking.

ctaSignals.text: DM us to book your styling session
ctaSignals.label: MEASURED

assertionChecklist: pinnedCommentText is non-null and contains 'DM us'
ctaSignals includes at least one from pinned_comment source
No ESTIMATED labels appear anywhere in output
